---
title: "Day 1 — Introduction to AI-Assisted Coding"
---

**Session goals:**

- See AI in action: live code refactoring demo with and without AI assistance
- Troubleshoot your Positron + GitHub Copilot setup
- Understand what AI can and cannot do for your coding workflow
- Practice the first two use cases: code refactoring and reproducibility package writing

By the end of this session you should be able to use AI independently on your
own computer and be ready for the self-study exercises.

---

## Session Structure (3 hours)

| Block | Duration | Topic |
|-------|----------|-------|
| 1 | 20 min | [Opening demo](demo-refactoring.qmd) — refactoring with and without AI |
| 2 | 30 min | Software walkthrough and troubleshooting |
| 3 | 45 min | [AI overview presentation](ai-overview.qmd) |
| 4 | 60 min | [Case studies](case-studies.qmd) — hands-on practice |
| 5 | 15 min | Q&A and discussion |

---

## Before You Arrive

Make sure all prerequisites are complete:

1. [Software Setup](../prerequisites/software.qmd)
2. [GitHub Setup](../prerequisites/github.qmd)
3. [Positron Extensions](../prerequisites/extensions.qmd)
4. [Positron Assistant](../prerequisites/assistant.qmd)

If you run into issues, check [Common Problems](../prerequisites/common-problems.qmd) or
contact [ITHelp@worldbankgroup.org](mailto:ITHelp@worldbankgroup.org) before the session.
